reference: I am fifty-seven years old, five feet tall, one hundred and fifty pounds. I have fibromyalgia, but my problem is I get catches in my hips. When that happens, it is excruciatingly painful, and I can hardly walk. This time it lasted for two days; most times it might just last a few hours. I usually lay down for a while, and it will go away, but sometimes it is worse than others. I had an Magnetic Resonance Imaging on my hips and my lower back, and they were negative.
text: I am 57 years old, 5 feet tall, 150 pounds. I have fibromyalgia, but my problem is I get catches in my hips. When that happens, it is excruciatingly painful, and I can hardly walk. This time it lasted for 2 days. Most times it might just last a few hours. I usually lay down for a while and it will go away, but sometimes it is worse than others. I had a magnetic resonance imaging on my hips and my lower back, and they were negative.
